TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Kobah, title = Kobah, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kobah} }

S.FORM: kobah Itiniay i Ren'ai Cen no Nantou ko kobah a niyaro', 56 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 141 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 74% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 104 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 26% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 37 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal67%, Seediq4%, Bunun1%, Cou1%.
S.PHON: ko~ub~b~vańß itiniaj i r…ôn °ai ¶…ôn no~u nanto~uo~u~u ko~u ko~ub~b~vańß a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u taja…ĺ**%, s…ô…ô…¨~…ģi**%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%, ¶o~uo~u~u*%.
S.FORM: kobah Itiniay i Ren'ai Cen no Nantou ko kobah a niyaro', 56 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 141 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 74% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 104 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 26% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 37 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal67%, Seediq4%, Bunun1%, Cou1%.
S.PHON: ko~ub~b~vańß itiniaj i r…ôn °ai ¶…ôn no~u nanto~uo~u~u ko~u ko~ub~b~vańß a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u taja…ĺ**%, s…ô…ô…¨~…ģi**%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%, ¶o~uo~u~u*%.
